title: Marcus and the Pancake Tower
synopsis: Marcus wants to help make pancakes for breakfast, but his tower of pancakes keeps getting taller and sillier, leading to giggles and a delicious family breakfast.

pages.text: Marcus smells something yummy! Mama is making pancakes in the kitchen. 'Can I help?' asks Marcus. 'Of course!' says Mama with a big smile.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes standing in a cozy kitchen with warm yellow lighting, looking up at his mama who is at the stove with a pan, steam rising from pancakes
illustration.alt: Marcus asking to help make pancakes in a warm kitchen

pages.text: Marcus gets his special step stool. He helps pour the batter - plop, plop, plop! The pancakes sizzle and bubble. 'Flip time!' says Mama.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes on a step stool helping pour pancake batter, flour dusted on his apron, warm orange kitchen lighting with steam rising from the pan
illustration.alt: Marcus on a step stool helping pour pancake batter

pages.text: Marcus watches the first pancake flip - whoosh! 'I want to make a tower!' he says. He stacks his pancake on a plate. One pancake tower!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes carefully placing a golden pancake on a plate, his tongue sticking out in concentration, cozy kitchen background with warm yellows
illustration.alt: Marcus concentrating as he places his first pancake on a plate

pages.text: Two pancakes! Three pancakes! Four! Marcus's tower gets taller and taller. It starts to wobble. 'Whoa!' says Marcus, trying to catch it.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes reaching out with both hands to steady a very tall, wobbly stack of pancakes, his eyes wide with surprise, warm kitchen lighting
illustration.alt: Marcus trying to catch his wobbly pancake tower

pages.text: TIMBER! The pancakes tumble down - one on the table, one on his head, one on the floor! Marcus giggles. Mama giggles too. 'Silly pancakes!'

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes laughing with a pancake on his head, mama laughing beside him, pancakes scattered around the cozy kitchen table with warm orange lighting
illustration.alt: Marcus and mama laughing with pancakes scattered everywhere

pages.text: They make new pancakes together. This time, Marcus makes a short, perfect stack. The whole family sits together and eats the yummy breakfast. 'Best pancakes ever!' says Marcus.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sitting at the dining table with his family, everyone wearing aprons, sharing a stack of golden pancakes with steam rising, warm yellows and oranges filling the homey kitchen
illustration.alt: Marcus and his family enjoying pancakes together at the dining table

metadata.illustrationStyle: cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food

questions.question: What does Marcus want to help make?
questions.explanation: Marcus wants to help make pancakes with his mama in the kitchen.

questions.question: What does Marcus use to reach the counter?
questions.explanation: Marcus gets his special step stool to help him reach the counter safely.

questions.question: What happens to Marcus's pancake tower?
questions.explanation: The tall pancake tower wobbles and tumbles down, making Marcus and mama laugh.

questions.question: How does Marcus feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Marcus is happy eating the best pancakes ever with his family.
